meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to use user onboarding to overcome no project ideas. A beginner-level checklist for founders using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea. Build a high-value onboarding flow for a generic SaaS niche. By focusing on user experience, you uncover product gaps and refine your technical skills. Use Antigravity for rapid architecture and Claude Code to implement the flow, turning blank screens into profitable, validated products.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the silent killer of ambition. You have the technical stack, the ambition, and the hunger to ship, but you are paralyzed by the absence of a 'billion-dollar' idea. This is the friction point where most founders quit before they ever write a line of production code.

The secret isn't a magical epiphany; it's the process of building the infrastructure first. By focusing on a frictionless user onboarding flow, you stop hunting for ideas and start building the foundation of a revenue-generating machine. Once the pipes are laid, the product ideas will reveal themselves through the data you collect.

steps.title: Define the Value-First Onboarding Flow
steps.description: Don't build a product; build the path to the 'Aha!' moment. Map out a 3-step sign-up process that delivers immediate value.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a 3-step user onboarding schema focusing on quick time-to-value for a SaaS boilerplate. Include fields for user goals and industry to help identify future feature pivots.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a React component for a multi-step onboarding wizard with state management'

steps.title: Implement Frictionless Authentication
steps.description: Users bounce when friction is high. Use social auth to eliminate the registration wall and get them into your app faster.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a secure authentication flow using NextAuth.js or Clerk that supports Google SSO and captures initial user intent data.

steps.title: Build the 'Aha!' Moment Dashboard
steps.description: Create a placeholder dashboard that simulates the core value of your future product to validate interest.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a dashboard grid layout that displays a mock data visualization based on the user's selected industry during onboarding.

steps.title: Integrate Behavioral Analytics
steps.description: If you don't track it, you can't improve it. Hook up analytics to see where users drop off in your flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate PostHog or Mixpanel event tracking into the onboarding flow to measure conversion rates for each step.

steps.title: Automate Feedback Loops
steps.description: Ask users why they signed up. This data is the gold mine for your next feature or product pivot.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a feedback modal that triggers after the user completes the onboarding process, asking for their primary business pain point.

pro_tips: Prioritize 'Time to First Value' (TTFV) over feature density; users pay for solutions, not complexity.
Use your onboarding flow as a discovery tool; ask users what they are trying to solve to find your next project idea.
Implement 'Progressive Profiling'—ask for user data over time rather than all at once to keep conversion rates high.
Treat your onboarding code as a modular package that can be ported to any future SaaS project you build.
Analyze your 'drop-off' metrics to identify where the user journey fails, then use that insight to pivot your product strategy.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, share it with 5 potential users, and record their feedback to finalize your product direction.
content.conversion_block: Stop spinning your wheels. You have the tools, the roadmap, and the expertise to build something that scales. The only variable left is your commitment to launch. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
